description_long: This is a large, elevated wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in dark shingles. The structure is supported by multiple wooden stilts, raising it above the ground, and features a prominent staircase leading up to a front porch with decorative railings. The front facade is open, revealing a spacious covered porch area, while the rear side is more enclosed with two rectangular windows. The roof extends well beyond the walls, providing significant overhangs for weather protection. The exterior is primarily composed of wood, with some visible white wall sections at the rear. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for both residential and recreational use in an urban or park setting.
description: A large, elevated wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, front porch, and prominent staircase, featuring both open and enclosed sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide staircase, open porch, and decorative railings beneath the steep gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the expansive shingled roof and the elevated structure on stilts, with a small porch visible at one end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two rectangular windows and a more enclosed wall section beneath the roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, highlighting the long roof and supporting stilts, with the porch at the far end.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with deep overhangs, covered in asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically placed on the rear wall, no visible windows on the front or sides
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade, accessed via the staircase and porch
